heading: Right of recovery where decedent retained interest
label: 2207B Right of recovery where decedent retained interest
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a)(2). amended heading and text of par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Paragraph (1) shall not apply if the decedent otherwise directs in a provision of his will (or a revocable trust) specifically referring to this section.”Pub. L. 105–341990—Subsec. (b). , redesignated former subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b) which read as follows: “If for any calendar year tax is paid under chapter 12 with respect to any person by reason of property treated as transferred by such person under section 2036(c)(4), such person shall be entitled to recover from the original transferee (as defined in section 2036(c)(4)(C)(ii)) the amount which bears the same ratio to the total tax for such year under chapter 12 as—Pub. L. 101–508, § 11601(b)(1)(A)“(1) the value of such property for purposes of chapter 12, bears to“(2) the total amount of the taxable gifts for such year.”Subsec. (c). , redesignated subsec. (d) as (c) and substituted “subsection (a)” for “subsections (a) and (b)” and “subsections (a) and (b)” for “subsections (a), (b), and (c)”. Former subsec. (c) redesignated (b).Pub. L. 101–508, § 11601(b)(1)Subsecs. (d), (e). , redesignated subsecs. (d) and (e) as (c) and (d), respectively. Former subsec. (d) redesignated (c).Pub. L. 101–508, § 11601(b)(1)(A)

children.label: A
children.text: the value of such property, bears to

children.heading: Decedent may otherwise direct
children.label: 2 Decedent may otherwise direct
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to any property to the extent that the decedent in his will (or a revocable trust) specifically indicates an intent to waive any right of recovery under this subchapter with respect to such property.

children.heading: More than one recipient
children.label: b More than one recipient
children.text: For purposes of this section, if there is more than 1 person receiving the property, the right of recovery shall be against each such person.

children.heading: Penalties and interest
children.label: c Penalties and interest
children.text: In the case of penalties and interest attributable to the additional taxes described in subsection (a), rules similar to the rules of subsections (a) and (b) shall apply.

children.heading: No right of recovery against charitable remainder trusts
children.label: d No right of recovery against charitable remainder trusts
children.text: No person shall be entitled to recover any amount by reason of this section from a trust to which section 664 applies (determined without regard to this section).
